close_reason: Extracted map_join_error helper for JoinError mapping
description: lib.rs:88-92 and lib.rs:120-124 are byte-for-byte identical: '.await.map_err(|e| SecretError::Backend { backend: "file", source: e.into() })?'. Extract a tiny helper 'fn join_to_secret(e: tokio::task::JoinError) -> SecretError' or inline as a free function. Same applies to all spawn_blocking-using backends in the workspace; consider lifting a shared helper to secretx-core (cross-crate scope: add a one-line note here referencing avkc.* parent epic if a workspace-wide cleanup tracking exists).
title: [chore] JoinError → SecretError::Backend mapping duplicated in get and put
